title: Reno Direct & Service Requests Report – January 2026
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 23, 2026
TO: Honorable Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Cynthia Esparza, Director
Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
DEPT: Community Engagement and Services
SUBJECT: Reno Direct & Service Requests Report – January 2026
Monthly reports provide insights into how constituents engage with the City of Reno through Reno Direct, the City of Reno's centralized customer service center and ServiceNow platform.
Key report highlights include:
• Number of Reno Direct constituent interactions (calls, voicemails, emails, online chats)
• Number of service requests submitted citywide
• Number of service requests closed citywide
• Top five trending service request types citywide
• Top five trending service request types by ward
This information supports efforts to enhance service delivery while addressing community needs in a responsive and equitable manner.

Attachments:
• January 2026 Service Request Trends & Interaction Report

fields.authors: Cynthia Esparza, Director; Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
fields.tldr: This memo presents the January 2026 monthly report on constituent interactions with Reno Direct and citywide service requests tracked through the ServiceNow platform. In January 2026, Reno Direct handled 2,749 total constituent interactions and 2,760 new service requests were submitted across all departments. Reno Police and Parking Enforcement received the highest volume of both new and closed requests, with illegal/abandoned parking being the top issue citywide. The report also breaks down the top five trending service request types for each of the six city wards.
fields.key_stats: Total constituent interactions: 2,749 (2,058 calls answered, 272 voicemails, 410 emails, 9 online chats); Total new service requests: 2,760; Total closed service requests: 2,464; Top citywide request: Parking Illegally/Abandoned (901); Reno Police & Parking Enforcement led all departments with 1,264 new and 1,064 closed requests.

people: Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
